overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a grand Gothic dining hall illuminated by thousands of floating candles, filled with students at long dining tables. The scene features high vaulted ceilings, ornate stained glass windows, and a translucent ghostly figure in the foreground, rendered in high-quality game engine graphics.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand Gothic dining hall with floating candle chandeliers

agents.ego_description: standing still at the rear of the hall observing the dining area and students seated at the long tables

notable_agents.action: translucent ghostly figure floating stationary near the right wall, partially transparent with ethereal blue-white glow

entered.detail: hundreds of floating candles suspended in mid-air forming a chandelier effect over the center aisle
cluster of floating candles suspended over the left dining tables
cluster of floating candles suspended over the right dining tables
large ornate stained glass window at the far end of the hall with Gothic tracery and colorful panes
Gothic stone archway framing the stained glass window with intricate carved details
long wooden dining tables lined with students extending down the center aisle
tall stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling along the left wall
tall stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling along the right wall

segments.scene_description: A static view of a magnificent Gothic dining hall illuminated by thousands of floating candles suspended overhead. Long dining tables fill the space with students seated along them, while a translucent ghostly figure hovers in the right foreground. The far end features a large stained glass window framed by stone arches, with warm candlelight casting golden illumination throughout the stone interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a grand Gothic dining hall bathed in the warm, flickering glow of thousands of floating candles. It begins by capturing the vast scale of the stone interior, where students are seated along long dining tables that stretch toward the back of the room. As the eye moves across the space, a translucent ghostly figure hovers in the right foreground, adding a supernatural layer to the atmosphere. The scene then draws focus toward the far end of the hall, where a large stained glass window is framed by ornate stone arches. Finally, the golden candlelight blends with the colors of the glass to illuminate the high vaulted ceilings and the depth of the architectural space.
